bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: 3Q EPS guidance is below Street expectations.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: INTU is indicated -4% post 2QFY26 results that beat, but 3Q EPS guidance that is below the Street: Revenue was 2.6% above, operating margin was ~250bps ahead, and EPS 13% above (FactSet). FY26 guidance is unchanged (typically unchanged until 3Q when tax season is over) and 3Q revenue guidance is in line with the Street, but 3Q EPS was guided 4% below.

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Signs of new competition in the low-end tax market.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: We lean less constructive at the low end, as we believe there are already signs of new competition, LLMs already have consumer distribution, and our 10+ years covering cybersecurity suggest that consumers generally place less weight on security/privacy risks (although this will likely vary by customer cohort).

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Large Language Models (LLMs) already have consumer distribution, posing a competitive risk in the low-end tax market.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: We lean less constructive at the low end, as we believe there are already signs of new competition, LLMs already have consumer distribution, and our 10+ years covering cybersecurity suggest that consumers generally place less weight on security/privacy risks (although this will likely vary by customer cohort).

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Consumers generally place less weight on security/privacy risks, which could undermine Intuit's competitive moat, especially at the low end of the tax market.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: We lean less constructive at the low end, as we believe there are already signs of new competition, LLMs already have consumer distribution, and our 10+ years covering cybersecurity suggest that consumers generally place less weight on security/privacy risks (although this will likely vary by customer cohort).

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Lowering of the 12-month price target due to lower peer multiples.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: We lower our 12-month price target to $519 (from $720), based on 19x (27x previously due to lower peer multiples) our rolled-forward Q5-Q8 EPS.

bearish_views.bearish_debate_point: Downward revision of revenue estimates for FY26, FY27, and FY28.
bearish_views.exact_sentences_in_the_file: We adjust our 2026E/2027E/2028E revenue estimates on the report to $21,319/$23,824mn/$26,350mn from $21,686/$24,534mn/ $27,260mn.
